overall.description: First-person driving perspective from inside an Audi vehicle traveling on a multi-lane highway during a heavy rainstorm at night. Windshield wipers operate continuously as the vehicle overtakes several other cars and a large truck. The scene appears to be rendered in a high-fidelity game engine with realistic rain physics and lighting effects.

passing circular speed limit sign indicating 60 on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person driving on a multi-lane highway during a heavy nighttime rainstorm. The vehicle travels along wet asphalt bordered by concrete barriers and metal guardrails, with street lights illuminating the scene. The driver overtakes a yellow sedan and then a red sedan on the left, while passing a speed limit sign indicating 60 km/h on the right side of the road.

events.description: overtaking large white commercial box truck on the left lane
passing under large overhead highway gantry structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while maneuvering past a large commercial truck

notable_agents.action: large white box truck being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: large metal overhead highway structure spanning across all lanes

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the rain-soaked highway, the vehicle overtakes a large white commercial box truck on the left. The scene features consistent highway infrastructure with concrete barriers and guardrails. The vehicle passes under a large overhead gantry structure that temporarily occludes the sky view, while street lights continue to illuminate the wet road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway stretch with light traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising on the highway with reduced traffic density, maintaining safe speed in heavy rain conditions

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows open highway driving with lighter traffic density. The vehicle continues through the heavy rain with wipers active, passing occasional vehicles ahead. The consistent highway infrastructure of concrete barriers, metal guardrails, and street lighting remains visible as the journey continues through the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective on a rain-slicked highway at night, moving from a sequence of active overtakes into a stretch of open road. It begins with the vehicle weaving through traffic, passing a yellow sedan and then a red sedan on the left while gliding past a 60 km/h speed limit sign. As the journey continues, the camera tracks the vehicle as it overtakes a large white commercial box truck before passing under a massive overhead gantry that momentarily frames the stormy sky. The scene then opens up into a less congested stretch of highway, where the density of traffic thins. Finally, the vehicle maintains its pace through the heavy rain, flanked by consistent concrete barriers and street lights that reflect off the wet asphalt.
